description: Expected artifact types per phase. Populated from skills/ directory. Add custom artifact types here to promote them to framework status.

artifacts.name: Research Synthesis
artifacts.description: Synthesized themes, patterns, and insight statements from raw interview transcripts or session notes
artifacts.dependency_risk: Strategist cannot frame the problem without a synthesis — will work from assumptions
artifacts.assumption_risk: User needs, behaviors, and mental models are assumed rather than evidenced

artifacts.name: Competitive Analysis
artifacts.description: Competitive landscape map: product comparisons, differentiators, strengths, weaknesses, opportunity gaps
artifacts.dependency_risk: Designer may duplicate existing solutions or miss obvious differentiators
artifacts.assumption_risk: Market positioning and white space are assumed rather than mapped

artifacts.name: Research Plan
artifacts.description: Research questions, recommended methods, participant criteria, session structure, and success criteria
artifacts.dependency_risk: Research sessions run without structure or alignment on what questions to answer
artifacts.assumption_risk: Research scope and priorities are assumed rather than agreed

artifacts.name: Insight Framing
artifacts.description: Actionable insight statements with supporting evidence, confidence ratings, and design implications
artifacts.dependency_risk: Strategist works from raw observations rather than synthesized insight
artifacts.assumption_risk: What the findings mean for design is assumed rather than explicitly stated

artifacts.name: Service Blueprint
artifacts.description: Layered service blueprint showing frontstage, backstage, and support processes
artifacts.dependency_risk: Multi-channel scope and service dependencies remain undocumented
artifacts.assumption_risk: Back-end processes and support systems are assumed to work as expected

artifacts.name: Problem Statement
artifacts.description: Validated problem statement in standard format: user, need, insight, barrier, opportunity
artifacts.dependency_risk: Designer generates concepts without a shared definition of what problem is being solved
artifacts.assumption_risk: The core problem and design opportunity are assumed rather than defined

artifacts.name: How Might We Questions
artifacts.description: 3+ HMW questions generated from the problem statement to open the design space
artifacts.dependency_risk: Concept generation has no creative constraints to push against
artifacts.assumption_risk: Design direction is assumed to be correct without structured reframing

artifacts.name: Persona
artifacts.description: Research-grounded persona with name, archetype, primary need, key behaviors, context, frustrations, and goals
artifacts.dependency_risk: Designer generates concepts for an abstract user rather than a specific, evidenced one
artifacts.assumption_risk: User needs, context, and behaviors are assumed rather than grounded in research

artifacts.name: Journey Map
artifacts.description: User journey across phases, touchpoints, emotions, pain points, and opportunities
artifacts.dependency_risk: Concept generation targets isolated screens rather than the full user journey
artifacts.assumption_risk: Current-state pain points and opportunity moments are assumed

artifacts.name: Assumption Map
artifacts.description: Assumptions ranked by risk if wrong × how well we know it
artifacts.dependency_risk: High-risk assumptions go unchecked into the design phase
artifacts.assumption_risk: Which beliefs need validation is assumed rather than explicitly prioritized

artifacts.name: Requirements Prioritization
artifacts.description: Prioritized requirements ranked by user value, business value, and feasibility
artifacts.dependency_risk: Designer prioritizes features based on personal judgment rather than explicit criteria
artifacts.assumption_risk: What must be built vs. what is nice-to-have is assumed

artifacts.name: Design Concepts
artifacts.description: 4+ meaningfully different design concepts with concept cards: name, summary, key design moves, trade-offs, assumptions
artifacts.dependency_risk: Team converges on one direction without exploring the space — may miss a better solution
artifacts.assumption_risk: The first idea generated is assumed to be the best direction

artifacts.name: Concept Critique
artifacts.description: Evaluation of concepts against desirability, feasibility, novelty criteria with written rationale
artifacts.dependency_risk: Direction is chosen without explicit evaluation — rationale is implicit and undocumented
artifacts.assumption_risk: Concept strengths and weaknesses are assumed rather than assessed

artifacts.name: Idea Clusters
artifacts.description: Brainstorm output grouped into named themes with a lead concept per cluster
artifacts.dependency_risk: Workshop or brainstorm output remains unstructured and unusable
artifacts.assumption_risk: Which ideas are related and which are distinct is assumed

artifacts.name: Storyboard
artifacts.description: Narrative storyboard showing how a user moves through a design direction
artifacts.dependency_risk: Concept is communicated abstractly — stakeholders cannot evaluate without seeing the flow
artifacts.assumption_risk: How the design fits into the user's real context is assumed

artifacts.name: Visual Design Execution
artifacts.description: Color system, type scale, visual style direction, and application to key screens
artifacts.dependency_risk: Systems Designer builds tokens without a defined visual style — tokens may need rebuilding
artifacts.assumption_risk: Visual direction and brand expression are assumed rather than defined

artifacts.name: Concept Proof
artifacts.description: Minimal concept proof — Figma Make prompt or HTML skeleton — from a concept description
artifacts.dependency_risk: Concept is evaluated theoretically rather than tested in tangible form
artifacts.assumption_risk: Whether the concept works as imagined is assumed

artifacts.name: User Flow
artifacts.description: End-to-end flow a user takes to complete a goal: steps, screens/states, decision points
artifacts.dependency_risk: Prototype is built without a documented flow — screens are disconnected
artifacts.assumption_risk: The full path from entry to goal completion is assumed to be understood

artifacts.name: Prototype
artifacts.description: Interactive or static prototype built to test a specific assumption or flow
artifacts.dependency_risk: Validation is attempted without a testable artifact — findings are speculative
artifacts.assumption_risk: Whether the design works for users is assumed rather than tested

artifacts.name: Prototype Scope
artifacts.description: Definition of what the prototype needs to test and how to build it with minimum effort
artifacts.dependency_risk: Prototype is over-built (wastes time) or under-built (can't answer the question)
artifacts.assumption_risk: What fidelity level is appropriate for the test objective is assumed

artifacts.name: UX Copy
artifacts.description: Interface copy for screens in scope: labels, empty states, error messages, onboarding, tooltips
artifacts.dependency_risk: Prototype uses placeholder text — usability test results are contaminated
artifacts.assumption_risk: How the interface communicates to users is assumed rather than designed

artifacts.name: Test Script
artifacts.description: Usability test script with scenario, tasks, probes, and success criteria
artifacts.dependency_risk: Test sessions are unstructured — findings cannot be compared across participants
artifacts.assumption_risk: What to ask and observe during sessions is assumed

artifacts.name: Accessibility Audit (Prototype)
artifacts.description: Pre-test accessibility check of prototype against WCAG 2.1 AA
artifacts.dependency_risk: Accessibility issues contaminate usability findings or require rework post-test
artifacts.assumption_risk: Prototype is assumed to be accessible without verification

artifacts.name: Heuristic Review
artifacts.description: Evaluation against Nielsen's 10 usability heuristics before user testing
artifacts.dependency_risk: Obvious usability issues surface during testing rather than being resolved beforehand
artifacts.assumption_risk: Prototype usability is assumed without expert review

artifacts.name: Usability Findings Synthesis
artifacts.description: Consolidated findings from usability test sessions: themes, patterns, severity ratings
artifacts.dependency_risk: Design iteration proceeds without structured findings — changes are based on impressions
artifacts.assumption_risk: What users struggled with and why is assumed rather than evidenced

artifacts.name: Insight Report
artifacts.description: Formatted insight report for stakeholder review: top findings, evidence, recommendations
artifacts.dependency_risk: Stakeholders cannot evaluate findings or make decisions without a structured report
artifacts.assumption_risk: What the findings mean for the product is assumed rather than explicitly stated

artifacts.name: Iteration Brief
artifacts.description: Prioritized list of changes to make based on validation findings, with rationale
artifacts.dependency_risk: Designer iterates without a prioritized list — changes may not address highest-severity issues
artifacts.assumption_risk: Which findings require design changes and which are acceptable risks is assumed

artifacts.name: Recruitment Screener
artifacts.description: Screener questions to qualify research participants for the study
artifacts.dependency_risk: Sessions include participants who don't match the target persona — findings don't generalize
artifacts.assumption_risk: Participant fit is assumed rather than verified

artifacts.name: Stakeholder Presentation
artifacts.description: Structured presentation for executive or client alignment on research findings and next steps
artifacts.dependency_risk: Stakeholders lack a shared understanding of findings — alignment on next steps is harder
artifacts.assumption_risk: Stakeholder buy-in is assumed rather than actively built

artifacts.name: Usability Testing Plan
artifacts.description: Plan for running usability test sessions: objectives, tasks, participant criteria, logistics
artifacts.dependency_risk: Sessions run without clear objectives or structure — findings are inconsistent
artifacts.assumption_risk: Test design and logistics are assumed to be understood by all involved

artifacts.name: Handoff Document
artifacts.description: Developer handoff package: component inventory, spec tables, interaction notes, token mapping, edge cases
artifacts.dependency_risk: Engineering builds from Figma alone — implementation diverges from intent
artifacts.assumption_risk: What developers need to implement the design correctly is assumed

artifacts.name: Design QA Log
artifacts.description: QA log comparing implementation to design spec: issue ID, severity, expected vs. actual, resolution status
artifacts.dependency_risk: Implementation ships with unresolved spec deviations
artifacts.assumption_risk: Implementation accuracy is assumed rather than verified

artifacts.name: Accessibility Audit
artifacts.description: Audit against WCAG 2.1 AA: pass/fail per criterion, affected component, remediation recommendation
artifacts.dependency_risk: Accessibility issues ship — legal risk and exclusion of users with disabilities
artifacts.assumption_risk: Implementation accessibility is assumed rather than audited

artifacts.name: Design Decision Records
artifacts.description: Formal records of design decisions: context, options considered, decision, rationale, trade-offs
artifacts.dependency_risk: Future teams cannot understand why decisions were made — decisions are relitigated
artifacts.assumption_risk: Rationale behind design choices is assumed to be remembered or obvious

artifacts.name: Component Specs
artifacts.description: Full component specifications: anatomy, props, token references, state matrix, accessibility notes, usage guidelines
artifacts.dependency_risk: Engineering implements components without a spec — states and variants are guessed
artifacts.assumption_risk: Component behavior, states, and token usage are assumed to be clear from Figma

artifacts.name: Design System Audit
artifacts.description: Audit against industry standards: coverage, consistency, accessibility pass rate, specific gaps
artifacts.dependency_risk: Design system inconsistencies ship without a record — technical debt accumulates silently
artifacts.assumption_risk: Design system quality and coverage are assumed rather than measured

artifacts.name: Handoff Annotation
artifacts.description: Design annotated for developer handoff: measurements, tokens, behaviors, edge cases
artifacts.dependency_risk: Developers interpret Figma directly — spacing, tokens, and behaviors are guessed
artifacts.assumption_risk: What needs explicit annotation vs. what is self-evident in Figma is assumed
